{{CargoRelic
|name=Magnifying Glass
|class_id=20073
|rank=Green
|affct=CIV
|source=
|description=This magnifying glass once belonged to a legendary English detective named Holmes. In that era, there was no advanced equipment, so the magnifying glass was an essential tool for a rigorous search of the crime scene. You can find all the traces the suspect left by using it!
|fame=16
|art=18
|fth=14
|civ=29
|tech=13
|ss1=Snail HP +10
|ss2=Snail HP +20
|ss3=Snail HP +30
|ss4=Snail HP +30
|ss7=Snail HP +30<br> (Awakened)
}}
